prestazioni: Replace the factory L88 (427ci) iron block with a Dart Machinery SHP Pro Iron block (4.250" bore, 4.000" stroke) for increased durability and compatibility with forged internals, paired with a Callies Compstar 4340 crankshaft (4.000" stroke) and Manley I-beam connecting rods (6.125" length) for a 496ci stroker build

Install a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (L88-specific grind: 280/290 duration @ .050", .600/.600" lift, 110° LSA) with Jesel belt-driven roller rockers (1.7:1 ratio) and titanium retainers from Ferrea Racing Components to optimize valvetrain stability at high RPM (7,500+ redline)

Upgrade the induction system with a Holley Dominator 1250 CFM carburetor (modified with annular boosters and a custom billet metering block) on an Edelbrock Victor Jr. L88 intake manifold, paired with a Nitrous Express Pro Shot Fogger system (150hp progressive shot) for on-demand power
estetica: Replace the factory fiberglass body panels with carbon fiber replicas from Corvette Central (1969-70 Stingray-specific, including the L88-only hood bulge) and apply a custom PPG Hot Hues "Sunset Orange" paint with a 3-stage pearl finish

Install a full-width rear spoiler from RK Sport (C3-specific, bolt-on design) and front splitter from Anderson Composites (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) to improve high-speed stability, paired with BBS LM wheels (17x9 front, 17x11 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/40ZR17 front, 335/35ZR17 rear)

Retrofit the interior with a full roll cage from Autopower (8-point, chromoly steel, L88-specific design) and Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, FIA-approved), paired with a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede) and a custom gauge cluster from Classic Instruments (160mph speedo, 10,000 RPM tach, oil pressure/voltage/water temp in L88-specific layout)
